title: athyrium strigillosum
intro: Athyrium strigillosum, also known as Japanese lady fern, is a species of fern in the genus Athyrium. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium strigillosum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Athyrium strigillosum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies, particularly in Asian medicine, to treat various health conditions.
